title: 中国军火销售下降是否表示外交的失败?
meta_description: 中国军火销售下降是否表示外交的失败? - https://www.voanews.com/a/chinese-weapons-exports-decline/6258163.html  [quote]Arms sales from the world’s No. 2 economy during ...
meta_keywords: 中国,军火,销售,下降,是否,表示,外交,失败
contents:
https://www.voanews.com/a/chinese-weapons-exports-decline/6258163.html

Arms sales from the world’s No. 2 economy during 2016-2020 were 7.8% lower than during the previous five-year span, according to data from the Stockholm International Peace Research Institute. In market share terms, China’s arms exports shrank from 5.6% to 5.2%, the data show.


通常一个国家能卖多少军火是和外国关系信任程度的反应(尤其是那些关系不错的)

最近五年的数据总金额和比例双双下降。这是否表示梁家河伟人的外交失败?
